success.title: Order Placed!
success.subtitle: Thank you for your order
success.message: We sent a confirmation to your email. We will prepare your food with love!

hero.subheadline: Fresh meals from INAO-certified ingredients — delivered straight to your office.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.step1Desc: Browse the weekly menu and add whatever you fancy today to your cart.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We prepare your meals from fresh INAO-certified ingredients.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We deliver between 8:00 and 10:00 — straight to your desk.

differentiators.subtitle: And neither should you.
differentiators.inaoDesc: We use only ingredients certified by the French National Institute of Origin and Quality. Because good food starts with good produce.
differentiators.freshDesc: Your meal reaches you within 24 hours of being made. Zero artificial preservatives. Zero frozen food.
differentiators.noFakeDesc: We don't count calories for you. We just make great food — for meat lovers, vegetarians, and spice enthusiasts.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How far in advance do I need to order?
faq.a1: Orders must be placed at least 1 day in advance. Order today — get it tomorrow morning between 8:00 and 10:00.
faq.a2: We deliver between 8:00 and 10:00, so you have food before the real workday begins.
faq.a3: Each dish includes information about its main ingredients. For serious allergies, please contact us — you'll find our number and email at the bottom of the page.
faq.q4: Can I order for the whole office?
faq.a4: Absolutely! Write or call us — we're happy to discuss group orders and special terms for your office.
faq.q5: How often does the menu change?
faq.a5: The menu changes every week. There's always something new to discover — from traditional Polish dishes to sushi and world cuisines.

loyalty.title: Loyalty programme
loyalty.desc: Earn points for every order and invite your office colleagues. Our regulars will hear first.
loyalty.thanks: Done! We'll let you know first.
